channel.title: Ai on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on Arrans github.io

item.title: vercel/ai-chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, …)

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 Lobe Chat - an open-source, modern-design AI chat framework. Supports Multi AI Providers( OpenAI / Claude 3 / Gemini / Ollama / Qwen / DeepSeek), Knowledge Base (file upload / knowledge management / RAG ), Multi-Modals (Vision/TTS/Plugins/Artifacts). One-click FREE deployment of your private ChatGPT/ Claude application.

item.title: SWE-agent/SWE-agent
item.description: SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using GPT-4, or your LM of choice. It can also be employed for offensive cybersecurity or competitive coding challenges. [NeurIPS 2024]

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The open source Firebase alternative. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: mendableai/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data. Scrape, crawl and extract with a single API.

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Assistants API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-4o, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active project.

item.title: lencx/ChatGPT
item.description: 🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Continue is the leading open-source AI code assistant. You can connect any models and any context to build custom autocomplete and chat experiences inside VS Code and JetBrains

item.title: microsoft/semantic-kernel
item.description: Integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps

item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: steven2358/awesome-generative-ai
item.description: A curated list of modern Generative Artificial Intelligence projects and services

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
item.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI 🔗 https://microsoft.github.io/generative-ai-for-beginners/

item.title: h2oai/h2o-llmstudio
item.description: H2O LLM Studio - a framework and no-code GUI for fine-tuning LLMs. Documentation: https://docs.h2o.ai/h2o-llmstudio/

item.title: sigoden/aichat
item.description: All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: LLM based autonomous agent that conducts deep local and web research on any topic and generates a long report with citations.

item.title: photoprism/photoprism
item.description: AI-Powered Photos App for the Decentralized Web 🌈💎✨

item.title: svc-develop-team/so-vits-svc
item.description: SoftVC VITS Singing Voice Conversion

item.title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
item.description: 12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

item.title: TabbyML/tabby
item.description: Self-hosted AI coding assistant

item.title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
item.description: Stable Diffusion web UI

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: 🤖 The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more models architectures. Features: Generate Text, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed, P2P inference

item.title: LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
item.description: Multi-Platform Package Manager for Stable Diffusion

item.title: evilsocket/pwnagotchi
item.description: (⌐■_■) - Deep Reinforcement Learning instrumenting bettercap for WiFi pwning.

item.title: getumbrel/llama-gpt
item.description: A self-hosted, offline, ChatGPT-like chatbot. Powered by Llama 2. 100% private, with no data leaving your device. New: Code Llama support!

item.title: pipecat-ai/pipecat
item.description: Open Source framework for voice and multimodal conversational AI

item.title: mahseema/awesome-ai-tools
item.description: A curated list of Artificial Intelligence Top Tools

item.title: huggingface/speech-to-speech
item.description: Speech To Speech: an effort for an open-sourced and modular GPT4-o

item.title: RSSNext/Follow
item.description: 🧡 Follow your favorites in one inbox

item.title: azkadev/whisper
item.description: Whisper Dart is a cross platform library for dart and flutter that allows converting audio to text / speech to text / inference from Open AI models

item.title: tmc/langchaingo
item.description: LangChain for Go, the easiest way to write LLM-based programs in Go

item.title: rishikanthc/Scriberr
item.description: Self-hosted AI audio transcription

item.title: rustformers/llm
item.description: [Unmaintained, see README] An ecosystem of Rust libraries for working with large language models

item.title: re50urces/Awesome-AI
item.description: A curated list of awesome things related to artificial intelligence tools

item.title: microsoft/aici
item.description: AICI: Prompts as (Wasm) Programs

item.title: louisgv/local.ai
item.description: 🎒 local.ai - Run AI locally on your PC!

item.title: microsoft/Windows-Machine-Learning
item.description: Samples and Tools for Windows ML.

item.title: dariubs/awesome-ai-models
item.description: A curated list of top AI models and LLMs

item.title: omegaui/linux-voice-control
item.description: Your personal, fully customizable, Linux Voice Control Assistant.

item.title: FireCubeStudios/Clippy
item.description: Bring back Clippy on Windows 10/11!

item.title: louisfb01/best_AI_papers_2023
item.description: A curated list of the latest breakthroughs in AI (in 2023) by release date with a clear video explanation, link to a more in-depth article, and code.
